improvements_applied: Semantic HTML with proper header/nav/main/footer landmarks
ARIA labels on all interactive elements and sections
Mobile-first responsive layout with hamburger menu
Sticky header for easy phone number access on mobile
Stats hero block replacing static banner image (no CLS)
Practice area cards with clear CTAs on homepage
Numbered process steps on practice area pages
Contact form with proper label associations and required field indicators
SEO metadata via Next.js Metadata API on every route

No broken image dependencies — remote images allowlisted in next.config.ts
TypeScript strict mode — zero type errors
Legal disclaimer and no-attorney-client-relationship notice in footer
Service area listed in footer for local SEO
